hypothesis: Already-selected trend_long Financials candidates near 52-week highs may deserve an extra risk lift from the accepted 1.5x baseline to 2.0x.
change_summary: Tested a stricter near-high Financials trend sizing lift in the shared portfolio sizing path. No entry, filter, ranking, exit, slot, add-on, LLM, news, earnings, or universe behavior changed. Strategy code was rolled back because Gate 4 failed.

market_regime_summary.mid_weak: rotation-heavy bull where strategy makes money but historically lagged indexes before recent allocation improvements
market_regime_summary.old_thin: mixed-to-weak older tape with lower win rate

delta_metrics.gate4_basis: Rejected: aggregate EV delta +0.0147 and PnL delta +0.90% are below Gate 4 materiality, with only 1/3 windows improved.

failed_pretest.variant: Replace accepted broad trend_long Financials 1.5x with only near-high 2.0x and non-near-high 1.0x
failed_pretest.result: Rejected before promotion because mid_weak regressed from EV 0.9147 / PnL 36590.41 to EV 0.8004 / PnL 31892.95.
failed_pretest.interpretation: The accepted broad 1.5x Financials trend sleeve should not be narrowed by simple near-high gating; doing so removes profitable COIN/GS-like exposure.

llm_metrics.blocker_relation: LLM soft-ranking remains data-limited, so this tested deterministic shared sizing alpha instead of adding subjective LLM behavior.

history_guardrails.not_repeating_sector_priority_ordering: This was sizing for already-selected trades only; no candidate ordering changed.
history_guardrails.not_repeating_financials_priority: No Financials entries, filters, universe candidates, or earlier slot access were added.

rejection_reason: Extra near-high Financials risk lift is too small and only active in old_thin; strict near-high replacement damages mid_weak.
next_retry_requires: Do not retry nearby Financials near-high multiplier thresholds or 2.0x sizing without forward evidence.
Do not narrow the accepted broad 1.5x trend Financials sleeve using simple pct_from_52w_high gating.
A valid retry needs an orthogonal event/state discriminator or a risk-budget metric showing material improvement without mid_weak damage.
